item.title: CVE-2026-34159 - CVE-2026-34159 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-34159-Vulnerability-Research-Analysis-Detection: Critical buffer validation bypass in deserialize_tensor() (llama.cpp < b8492). Null tensor buffer skips bounds check, enabling unauthenticated arbitrary R/W via GRAPH_COMPUTE. ASLR bypass + RCE over TCP 50052.
